channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Famed iPhone, Sony Hacker Says AI Coding Agents Are a Disaster Waiting to Happen
item.description: George Hotz spent six months testing agents on real projects and came away convinced they're creating an avalanche of undetectable slop—and that large organizations won't realize it until it's too late.

item.title: UAE-linked ADI Chain gains Ledger support amid stablecoin growth
item.description: The integration gives ADI token holders access to Ledger’s self-custody platform as ADI Chain expands its stablecoin and tokenized asset network.

item.title: With Central Bank’s Blessing, Georgia Taps Tether for 'Official' Stablecoin
item.description: Tether plans to issue a stablecoin in Georgia with support from the country’s government, marking a new frontier for the crypto giant.

item.title: Crypto PAC money pours into Texas primary runoffs, as prediction markets favor challengers
item.description: The crypto-aligned Protect Progress PAC reported spending another $750,000 on media for a Democratic candidate over Representative Al Green, whom it described as “actively hostile” to digital assets.

item.title: NEAR price rally gains momentum as cross-chain product activity fuels further 15% jump
item.description: The rally is fueled by NEAR Intents, the cross-chain system that has processed over $19 billion in volume and generated $32 million in fees.

item.title: Perplexity Built a Tool That Checks Your Computer for Infected Software—Without Setting Off the Infection
item.description: Bumblebee scans developer machines for compromised packages and AI tool configs. Its core trick: It never actually runs the code it's looking for.

item.title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket, calling prediction market online gambling in disguise
item.description: Authorities stated that using crypto or blockchain doesn't change platforms that let users wager on uncertain outcomes from being gambling products.

item.title: Bitcoin, crypto prices tick up as US-Iran peace deal odds climb
item.description: Iranian negotiators arrived in Doha for talks, focusing on the Strait of Hormuz and highly enriched uranium, as Pakistan and Qatar are mediating.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin Signals Shift to 'Smaller Ship' at Ethereum Foundation Amid Departures
item.description: Buterin revealed that 90% of his net worth is tied up in Ethereum.

item.title: Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will shrink, sell less ETH, and focus on 'CROPS'
item.description: Buterin's influence in the EF will decrease as the board expands. He framed the EF as "one node, with a defined purpose," not the center of Ethereum.

item.title: CoinQuant introduces trading infrastructure for the agent economy
item.description: CoinQuant, the AI-powered no-code trading platform that has attracted over 15,000 users since launch, today announces its expansion into a unified trading intelligence architecture built for both human traders and autonomous AI agents.

item.title: Squid and Safe Labs say third-party module behind $3.2M exploit
item.description: A third-party module drained about $3 million from Safe wallets, with Squid attributing the incident to an external Safe module, saying its core systems were unaffected.

item.title: Pope Leo Releases First AI Encyclical, Calls Data a Common Good and Rejects Moral Neutrality of Tech
item.description: The 245-paragraph document was presented alongside Anthropic co-founder Christopher Olah, whose company is actively suing the Trump administration over military AI use.

item.title: Lucknow man got an ₹88 lakh tax notice for Bitcoin trading. He had invested around ₹9.6 lakh and reported a loss of ₹3.3 lakh. So why did the tax notice become ₹88 lakh? Here’s what happened 👇🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFB5a0dkS1hDcTdydzZJWS1mbjYtR1lmcmJNNEl3YkU3NDhWU2lMZFR2NzlFX1N5N3hyTEpmYlRZTFppYjE5cTc1ZlRkV29ZTVVfeDJHRVFJTlJyS0lNREUw?oc=5" target="_blank">Lucknow man got an ₹88 lakh tax notice…

item.title: ARIQO makes its Bangkok debut at SEABW, drawing industry attention
item.description: Canton Foundation, Toss, BitGo Among Co-Hosts at Private Event; Token Launch Slated for Second Half of 2026

item.title: Coinbase CEO’s finance wishlist mirrors company’s product roadmap
item.description: Brian Armstrong's wishlist for upgrading global finance aligns with the exchange's push into stocks, prediction markets and stablecoin payments, though some priorities remain aspirational.

item.title: Ethereum whale opens $100M short as Vitalik Buterin vows to 'sell less ETH'
item.description: ETH’s rebound toward the whale’s liquidation zone near $2,150 puts its short at risk of over $1 million in potential losses.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Paper losses and scrapped ETFs. What Trump Media’s 2,650 BTC transfer really means
item.description: Digital asset treasuries (DATs) and the broader practice of building corporate Bitcoin reserves became hugely popular in 2024 and 2025, thanks in large part to the success of Strategy, whose "flywheel" many tried to replicate.

item.title: Cyannova Capital announces global launch at its first strategic reception in Hong Kong
item.description: Cyannova Capital (“Cyannova” or the “Company”), a New York-based investment firm, announces its inaugural investment fund, Cyannova Capital, LP, at its private industry reception held in Hong Kong.

item.title: Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner transfers $203M in BTC to OTC desks
item.description: A Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner moved 2,650 BTC worth about $203 million to FalconX and Cumberland, while retaining 6,000 BTC.

item.title: PCE, jobless claims and housing data test Fed cut hopes: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 25.

item.title: Bitcoin risks drop to $72K as demand metric hits 2026 lows
item.description: Bitcoin’s weakening demand failed to absorb increased selling pressure, raising risks of a further BTC price drop toward $72,000.

item.title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket after bets on president’s exit
item.description: Indonesia blocked Polymarket after users bet on President Prabowo Subianto leaving office early, citing gambling concerns and expanding global scrutiny of prediction markets.

item.title: Crypto lobby spending on Republicans far outpaces Democratic support
item.description: The crypto lobby has spent tens of millions of dollars more on Republican candidates and elections than on Democratic lawmakers.

item.title: Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner transfers are back on-chain. A whale from the earliest days of Bitcoin just moved 2,650 BTC worth roughly $203M to institutional trading firms FalconX and Cumberland. The miner still holds an estimated 6,000 BTC worth over $460M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5rLUFuVHhLc0pSZDV1N1A3bkJJbUtfZktZaFpsbVB4ZkNRdERBamwteEc2NnE0MDVOVlVOLUdzc2pjS3o1RVFHYm5CcE80N2ZoWklJbDJtUEFYOGE2a2dkZGxuLUxlUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner tr…

item.title: BTC price to attack $80K shorts on Iran peace deal: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders predicted a short squeeze to $80,000, but a lack of overall demand and the return of leverage sparked warnings of more liquidation events to come.

item.title: Prometheum bets Wall Street distribution is the missing link for tokenized securities
item.description: Crypto has solved tokenization, but not distribution and Prometheum says broker-dealers and RIAs are the key to bringing digital assets into mainstream finance.

item.title: Influence360 launches as the first AI & data-driven Web3 KOL platform with global KOL coverage and real attribution
item.description: Influence360 today announced the launch of its platform, introducing a new infrastructure layer for Web3 influencer marketing built around trust, data, and global execution.

item.title: New York lawsuit tests lost property claim over dormant Bitcoin
item.description: A New York lawsuit seeks ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, raising questions over lost crypto, private keys and property law.

item.title: 🚨 Blockaid detected an ongoing exploit targeting the SquidRouterModule on Ethereum and Base. 86 Gnosis Safes drained for ~$3M in ~2 hours. All stolen tokens swapped to DAI via attacker-controlled Uniswap V3 pools. More details in 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE8zVGRhSVJUWlFaRG5WSC1IMHJHTmc3TUJ1V0pyY3JXQWFxdm16alNqVlA4VW9pTm1ZUTFJbkZzVWNSMkZjWGJkY0tSVHAwNHZqUEtQY1R3N2x5S2FzcFcw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 Blockaid detected an ongoing exploi…

item.title: Tether, Georgia plan lari-backed stablecoin GELT under new rules
item.description: Georgia’s central bank released stablecoin rules in March covering reserve backing, issuer documents and external auditor verification.

item.title: Warren's war on crypto was a pure own-goal by the Democrats. It achieved nothing, and it cost them enormously by alienating a large fraction of a powerful group who'd previously supported them. Look at the change from 2020 to 2024. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE9GUjByaUZyTlNiZ0NOYUJPUTQ5UUg5YkYwWEFKSzRBeENQQXIxaThhUVZ2czVPclNOU0k3RF9BMmROOFhoYnhiSEhMZmZUdXFydXZ0al9abHNzZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Warren's war on crypto was a pure own-goal b…

item.title: HYPE funds attract millions as investors dump bitcoin and ether ETFs
item.description: Investors turn to HYPE and XRP funds while dumping bitcoin and ether ETFs.

item.title: 🐋 ALERT: A Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner deposited 2,650 BTC worth around $203M into FalconX and Cumberland, per Onchain Lens. The wallet still holds 6,000 BTC valued at roughly $462M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE03UjdjNUZuY283WVBhWVBxYjVtTnNDb0ZCRnhROEdNS3hWc3l2bUhuUHJJUzBmTXNHY2E1TGF6VFVnamdkLVNYbTR1cVlsUXNUZ3pjVHZydXJKZUh0UEgzY3FIU0E?oc=5" target="_blank">🐋 ALERT: A Satoshi-era Bitcoin…

item.title: Hyperliquid is emerging as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets, says FalconX
item.description: A new report shows Hyperliquid is rapidly expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets, prediction contracts, and 24/7 asset trading, putting Wall Street giants on high alert.

item.title: I think #Bitcoin is ready for higher grounds. If there's going to be a peace deal in the coming days in the Middle East; - Oil goes down. - Yields go down. - Risk on assets will do well. - #Bitcoin breaks above $80k+ again. - #Altcoins will have their time for the enti - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1FTTdMTEduTmhEdl9kRWtDdmd4Ty1PT3QzZ1I3UTN1a0lCQUdNMlN4cW5aclgzZlF6NTlvSHZ1Sk1qVnNDMXVJUncxMG9KWWZjOUtvaklSRTdvTDhmbXBORnRDaw?oc=5" target="_blank">I think #Bitcoin is ready for hi…

item.title: Crypto entrepreneur Chun Wang joins SpaceX mission to Mars
item.description: Chun Wang, who bankrolled and led a SpaceX flight over Earth’s poles, says he will head to Mars on SpaceX’s first manned mission to the red planet.

item.title: Bitcoin trades above $77,000 as oil's 5% slide pushes Asian equities higher
item.description: Oil’s 5% drop on potential Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted Asian equities and supported crypto sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs' 6 day loss streak pushes market closer to net outflows for 2026
item.description: Dek: US Bitcoin ETF net inflows have shrunk to $536 million so far in 2026, after recording a six-day run of net outflows totalling $1.55 billion.

item.title: BLACKROCK JUST SOLD $1 BILLION OF BTC BlackRock sold Bitcoin every single day last week. They sold a total of $1.01 BILLION of BTC. If BlackRock is selling… who’s buying? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9waHhVeDRmVzVEbFZQMG5FcUJLNXUxaGVWaFRvYjRhTUpWUTJLZS1qTTFMR1E3UFk5bGlZUmljVXNwaTFLZDFGMnM3VnFPYU1BTWVIeWFoWFVTWlk?oc=5" target="_blank">BLACKROCK JUST SOLD $1 BILLION OF BTC Black…

item.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you
item.description: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management.

item.title: Vitalik: Ethereum Foundation to Sell Less ETH Going Forward Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin said in a post on X that the Ethereum Foundation has decided to use its remaining resources to prioritize long-term sustainability rather than expanding the brea - x.com

item.title: I hate Ethereum as much as the next Bitcoin Maximalist but even I can't help but feel a bit sorry for how bad things are for them now. - x.com

item.title: Strategy Buys Bonds, Not Bitcoin This Week; Holdings at 843,738 BTC Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor said in a post on X that the company bought bonds, not Bitcoin, this week. The accompanying chart shows that as of May 24, 2026, Strategy’s - x.com

item.title: Now You Can Buy Bitcoin, XRP and More in ChatGPT via MoonPay
item.description: MoonPay's new app lets users buy cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Solana, through ChatGPT just by speaking with the chatbot.

item.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
item.description: A Coinbase executive called on regulators to implement sensible crypto regulation, while announcing the Stand With Crypto event taking place in over 500 locations worldwide.

item.title: Strategy Now Holds $65 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
item.description: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

item.title: Crypto and the Fed: State of Crypto
item.description: This past week saw incremental, but potentially important steps.

item.title: ⚡️ JUST IN: Vitalik Buterin says the Ethereum Foundation is moving toward a leaner role, with less emphasis on expansion and broader ecosystem control. Buterin adds the EF plans to sell less ETH and currently holds around 0.16% of total ETH supply. - x.com

item.title: Vitalik：EF Is Not Ethereum’s Center, but a Smaller Node With a Clear Mission Vitalik Buterin said the Ethereum Foundation is not the “center” of Ethereum, but one node with a clearly defined purpose. He said the EF will become smaller, more long-term-orient - x.com

item.title: AI Startup Says It Will Pay People $2,000 a Month to Masturbate—Yes, Really
item.description: Joi AI is hiring 10 “masturbation consultants” to test its AI-guided masturbation feature and report how it affects stress, sleep, mood, and confidence.

item.title: Some of my perspective on where the @ethereumfndn is going. First of all, this is only my own view. The board is not just me, and I have no extra special powers on the board that the other board members do not. @aerugoettinea is the one executing much of t - x.com

item.title: A massive $1 trillion hidden market is waiting to be unlocked in bitcoin, says new report
item.description: Ledn forecasts the bitcoin-backed lending market could grow to $1 trillion within a decade as new research highlights strong borrower demand.

item.title: This week we bought bonds, not bitcoin. The ₿itVac is charging. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1LMDlvdnFGMW9WWlBnTC1Xc1pIZjR4RkNCWnZrSkp6UUhhcEF3WTY5am5rQ3Y4aHdvS1FxRk15TDlGbUxXdWpaZldhR2IzcVBxZE5WMGJ0UWppZE0?oc=5" target="_blank">This week we bought bonds, not bitcoin. The…

item.title: AI is speeding up the quantum threat to crypto, security experts warn
item.description: Researchers and builders believe that artificial intelligence may be accelerating the quantum timeline and forcing a broader rethink of how digital security works.

item.title: Crypto rails are becoming the default payment layer for AI agents, report says
item.description: A new report from Keyrock says stablecoins on blockchain rails are becoming the go-to payment layer for AI agents as traditional card rails struggle to handle micropayments.

item.title: Binance Australia to Require Sender and Beneficiary Info for Crypto Transfers From July 1 Binance announced that from July 1, 2026, Australian users must provide sender information for incoming crypto deposits and beneficiary information for outgoing withdr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1sYTZXYThxRS1YbldzcWRXRzlvcURiQWMzeTlkVjZ0THhLeHdSN0c4RnVwdTlCRGthczRESmFNdnBZOS1HQUZSbkJZNEp5Z1EwOFVRQ0c3UEppcGxEWno2YU4wNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance Australia to Require Sen…

item.title: Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement
item.description: "An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries," wrote President Trump late Saturday afternoon.

item.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
item.description: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly stick…
